title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 57.060 - Bond valid until disapproved
text:
57.060.  Bond valid until disapproved. — Such bond shall be valid until disapproved; nor shall its obligations be impaired by the disapproval of the circuit court.
(RSMo 1939 § 13130) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11510; 1919 § 11634; 1909 § 11205
